'''Iyuta''' was an underdeveloped [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. Controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was the location of several important governmental facilities and was well protected by [[spy satellite]]s<ref name="Plant" /> and large [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]].<ref name="Plant-CC">{{WEGCite|story=The Plant|book=Classic Campaigns}}</ref> The small [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Takari]] was situated on the planet, served by the [[Iyuta spaceport]]. An [[Imperial Communications Center (Iyuta)|Imperial Communications Center]] was built outside the city over an old sewer system.<ref name="Plant" />

{{Planet-stub}}
